name: Holiday Charlotte
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the ladyfingers and line the bottom and sides of a 9-inch charlotte mold or bowl with them.
2. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and water. Bring to a boil and cook for 2 minutes. Allow to cool.
3. Beat egg yolks in a large bowl. Gradually add the cooled sugar syrup.
4. Blend in the melted chocolate. Fold in whipped cream.
5. Pour the mixture into the ladyfinger-lined pan, leaving about 1 inch from the rim.
6. Chill until set.
7. When ready to serve, remove the cake from the mold.
8. Fill the top of the cake with fruit and brush the fruit with melted apple jelly.
